mapper.select: /** UsptTaskRspnberHistDao.selectMaxHist */ select a.* from ( select task_rspnber_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_task_rspnber_hist_id ,rspnber_nm ,enc_brthdy ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_email ,dept_nm ,clsf_nm ,adres ,enc_telno ,enc_fxnum ,tlsy_regist_no ,row_number() over (order by created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_task_rspnber_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_task_rspnber_hist_id is null or confm_task_rspnber_hist_id = '') ) a where a.rn = 1

/** UsptTaskRspnberHistDao.selectUsptTaskRspnberHistChangeDe */ select cnvn_change_req_id , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmdd') as change_de , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') as change_dt from uspt_task_rspnber_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_task_rspnber_hist_id is null or confm_task_rspnber_hist_id ='') /*변경전정보는 제외*/ order by created_dt desc

/** UsptTaskRspnberHistDao.selectUsptTaskRspnberHistByDt */ select 'before' as change_be_af ,task_rspnber_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_task_rspnber_hist_id ,rspnber_nm ,enc_brthdy ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_email ,dept_nm ,clsf_nm ,adres ,enc_telno ,enc_fxnum ,tlsy_regist_no ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_task_rspnber_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and confm_task_rspnber_hist_id is not null and confm_task_rspnber_hist_id !='' union all select 'after' as change_be_af ,task_rspnber_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_task_rspnber_hist_id ,rspnber_nm ,enc_brthdy ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_email ,dept_nm ,clsf_nm ,adres ,enc_telno ,enc_fxnum ,tlsy_regist_no ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_task_rspnber_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_task_rspnber_hist_id is null or confm_task_rspnber_hist_id = '') and to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') = #{changeDt}
